jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Nocil
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Nocil in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nocil:
Nocil is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nocil!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
